description_long: This object is a standard North American duplex electrical wall outlet, featuring two vertically aligned sockets set into a rectangular faceplate. The faceplate is smooth and slightly beveled at the edges, with two oval-shaped openings for the sockets, each containing three slots: two parallel vertical slots and a round ground slot beneath them. The front surface is a clean, matte white, while the sides and back are a contrasting dark color, likely representing the insulated housing. The object is slim and flat, designed to be mounted flush against a wall, with no visible screws or branding on the faceplate. The overall design is utilitarian and minimal, suitable for residential, commercial, or public urban environments. The outlet is intended for the safe connection of electrical plugs to an AC mains power supply.
description: A white, rectangular duplex wall outlet with two vertically stacked sockets and a smooth, beveled faceplate. The sides and back are dark, contrasting with the clean front surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white faceplate with two standard sockets, each with three slots for plug prongs.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the slim, dark-colored profile of the outlet, with the faceplate edge visible at the top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid, dark back of the outlet, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim profile and the contrasting faceplate edge.
